risks.description: Video footage captured U.S. President Donald Trump refusing to leave the podium until FIFA president Gianni Infantino tried to usher him away.

risks.description: The singer, 38, joined a string of big names at the match in New York's MetLife Stadium, with Spain crowned world champions for the second time after beating Argentina 1-0.

risks.title: Lamine Yamal breaks all-time record as Spain win World Cup, but young brother Keyne steals show
risks.description: Lamine Yamal has just helped Spain to football’s biggest prize, winning the 2026 World Cup final against Argentina. He makes history as the youngest player to win both the World Cup and Euros, doing so just days after his 19th birthday.

risks.description: An SBS host ended the broadcaster's FIFA World Cup coverage with a message celebrating multiculturalism, weeks after Pauline Hanson criticised the network.

risks.title: And the 2026 FIFA World Cup... Does Not Go To Trump!
risks.description: Few have managed to cram so much corruption into a single sport as Trump and Gianni Infantino, and spectators—as well as players—seemed to not want them at Sunday’s match.

risks.title: Toni Kroos drops viral 2-word verdict on Spain win
risks.description: Former Germany midfielder Toni Kroos reacted to Spain's FIFA World Cup 2026 triumph with a two-word message, "Football won." Spain defeated Argentina 1-0 in extra time, securing their second world title and extending their unbeaten international run.

risks.title: Rapper Drake loses over N2bn bet after Argentina lost to Spain
risks.description:
Canadian rapper Drake has lost a $1.5 million (more than N2 billion) bet after Argentina were beaten 1-0 by Spain in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final.
The post Rapper Drake loses over N2bn bet after Argentina lost to Spain appeared first on Vanguard News.

risks.title: I lost N5m to betting, Destiny Etiko says after World Cup final

Nollywood actress Destiny Etiko reveals she lost N5 million betting on the 2026 World Cup final, vowing to quit gambling after the experience.
